title: Decorations Not Found
description: Adds simple decorations inspired by Minecraft's missing textures.
body:
# Decorations Not Found
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/E6john8A)
[![codeberg](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/codeberg_vector.svg)](https://codeberg.org/Maganoos/deco-not-found)

Decorations not found is a simple decorative mod based on Minecraft's missing/debug textures.

### Obtaining
Obtaining these decorative blocks entails going to the top of each world, and placing a specific block at the very top.

For the default pink one, you must place an amethyst block in the overworld. For the red one, you must place red nether bricks in The Nether. And finally for the purple one, you must place a purpur block at the top of The End.

The red and pink ones can then be turned into stairs, slabs, and walls, and all of them can be turned into smaller tiles.

Update grass, exclamation dirt, and question dirt can be obtained by placing grass, coarse dirt, and dirt at the top of the overworld, respectively.

To get the transparent variants of each of the missing blocks, simply smelt them in a furnace.

### Info
The mod Integrates with [Reliable Recipe Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrv) to show the recipes.

### Contributing
All contributions are welcome. Simply create a pull request on the [Codeberg Page](https://codeberg.org/Maganoos/deco-not-found).
#### Translating
Translations are a bit more convoluted than normal, as the mod is split into two translation files. One can be found under `src/main/resources/assets/deco-not-found/lang/[language].json`, and the other can be found under `src/main/resources/resourcepacks/translation-keys/assets/deco-not-found/lang/[language].json`.

---

All textures are by [MiffenKop](https://modrinth.com/user/miffenkop)

![All items](https://files.catbox.moe/91uo2g.webp)
